examples.title: Replacing backing fields with auto-properties
examples.description: Auto-implemented properties eliminate boilerplate field declarations for simple getters and setters.

examples.title: Migrating from manual properties
examples.description: See how auto-properties transform verbose property implementations into clean, minimal syntax.
